long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between cbs04.eq01.wdc02 et-0/0/5 <-> cbs01.eq01.ams02 et-1/0/19. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19589
short_description: cbs04.eq01.wdc02 et-0/0/5 <--> cbs01.eq01.ams02 et-1/0/19 | Link flap
close_notes: Link is up , waiting for the RFO from provider
